task_objective: Fix Syncthing 'Uploading' stuck UI bug by removing flawed remote sequence checking.
tests_added: Updated sequence-mismatch test case in test_syncthing.py to assert settled=True
Updated syncthingMonitor.test.ts to verify frontend monitoring changes
Updated test_watcher.py to reflect removed parameters
design_decisions: Removed `remote_sequence` from `FolderRuntime` as it caused a logic flaw comparing local sequences to remote peer sequences.
Defined SYNCTHING COMPLETE strictly as locally observed activity settling, not full remote sync validation.
Ensured backend errors explicitly block settlement completion.
Enforced strict monotonic timestamp advancement in `syncthingMonitor.ts`.
results: All tests passed. 'Uploading' bug resolved. Documentation updated.
